examples: I watched the moth crawl up the outside of the lampshade.
David spotted the pink silk lampshade in a shop and thought it would brighten up the room.
The invader saw the shadow of the lampshade fade away.
Among the products featured is Allium, a spherical lampshade made from peacock feather-shaped slats.
On a table between the bookcases I put a tall candlestick lamp with a lampshade in Robert Kime's very pretty Pea Pods fabric.
